---
title: "Examples"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Examples

This page is a practical launch pad for common DPmixGPD tasks. Use it to pick a workflow path, then open the full walk-through pages.

[Start workflow series](../QuickStart/start-here.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Workflow roadmap](../roadmap.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[Open pkgdown articles](/pkgdown/articles/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### First model in minutes
- Start at [Getting Started](../getting-started.html)
- Then run [Model specification article](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Then follow [QuickStart: Start Here](../QuickStart/start-here.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Unconditional modeling
- Bulk only: [Unconditional article](/pkgdown/articles/unconditional.html)
- Bulk + tail details: [Model specification article](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Example sequence: [ex05-ex09](ex05-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Conditional modeling
- Covariate-driven density modeling: [Conditional article](/pkgdown/articles/conditional.html)
- Model setup details: [Model specification](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Example sequence: [ex10-ex13](ex10-conditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Causal modeling
- End-to-end causal workflow: [Causal article](/pkgdown/articles/causal.html)
- Model and posterior details: [Model specification](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Example sequence: [ex14-ex19](ex14-causal-no-x-CRP.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Backend decisions
- Compare CRP vs stick-breaking: [Model specification](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Structured choice support: [Decision Guide](../decision-guide.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Diagnostics and checks
- MCMC process and diagnostics: [Model specification](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Frequently asked issues: [FAQ](../faq.html)
:::

:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Workflow Segments

Use these segment hubs to stay in-sequence without guessing where to go next.

::: {.grid-2}

::: {.cardx}
### QuickStart + Troubleshooting
[Start Basic sequence](../QuickStart/start-here.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Jump to troubleshooting](ex20-troubleshooting.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}

1. [Start Here](../QuickStart/start-here.html)
2. [Introduction](../QuickStart/introduction.html)
3. [Basic model compile and run](../QuickStart/basic-model-compile-run.html)
4. [Backends and workflow](../QuickStart/backends-and-workflow.html)
5. [ex20 Troubleshooting](ex20-troubleshooting.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Unconditional examples (ex05-ex09)
[Start Unconditional sequence](ex05-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html){.btn .btn-primary}

1. [ex05 Unconditional DPmix CRP](ex05-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
2. [ex06 Unconditional DPmix CRP](ex06-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
3. [ex07 Unconditional DPmix SB](ex07-unconditional-DPmix-SB.html)
4. [ex08 Unconditional DPmixGPD CRP](ex08-unconditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html)
5. [ex09 Unconditional DPmixGPD SB](ex09-unconditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Conditional examples (ex10-ex13)
[Start Conditional sequence](ex10-conditional-DPmix-CRP.html){.btn .btn-primary}

1. [ex10 Conditional DPmix CRP](ex10-conditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
2. [ex11 Conditional DPmix SB](ex11-conditional-DPmix-SB.html)
3. [ex12 Conditional DPmixGPD CRP](ex12-conditional-DPmixGPD-CRP.html)
4. [ex13 Conditional DPmixGPD SB](ex13-conditional-DPmixGPD-SB.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Causal examples (ex14-ex19)
[Start Causal sequence](ex14-causal-no-x-CRP.html){.btn .btn-primary}

1. [ex14 Causal no X CRP](ex14-causal-no-x-CRP.html)
2. [ex15 Causal X no propensity score SB](ex15-causal-x-no-ps-SB.html)
3. [ex16 Causal same backend CRP](ex16-causal-same-backend-CRP.html)
4. [ex17 Causal same backend SB](ex17-causal-same-backend-SB.html)
5. [ex18 Causal different backends CRP](ex18-causal-different-backends-CRP.html)
6. [ex19 Causal different backends SB](ex19-causal-different-backends-SB.html)
:::

:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Where to go next

1. Use [Kernels](../kernels.html) if you are uncertain about distribution family selection.
2. Use [Reference](../reference.html) to jump directly to function docs.
3. Use [Workflow troubleshooting](ex20-troubleshooting.html) if you are blocked.

:::
:::
